sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ العَرَبُ بِعِيدِ الفِطْرِ بَعْدَ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ المُبَارَكِ.
sentences.translation: Arapi slave Ramazanski bajram nakon blagoslovljenog mjeseca ramazana.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs celebrate Eid al-Fitr after the blessed month of Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: يَرْتَدِي الأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَيَشْعُرُونَ بِفَرْحَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca nose novu odjeću i osjećaju veliku radost.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear new clothes and feel great joy.

sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ العَائِلَاتُ لِتَنَاوُلِ الحَلْوِيَّاتِ مِثْلَ المَعْمُولِ وَالبَقْلَاوَةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodice se okupljaju kako bi jele slatkiše poput mamula i baklave.
sentences.translationEn: Families gather to eat sweets like maamoul and baklava.

sentences.arabic: يَتَبَادَلُ النَّاسُ التَّهَانِيَ وَالزِّيَارَاتِ بَيْنَ الأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالجِيرَانِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi razmjenjuju čestitke i posjete među prijateljima i komšijama.
sentences.translationEn: People exchange greetings and visits among friends and neighbors.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ وَقْتٌ لِلتَّسَامُحِ وَتَقْوِيَةِ العَلَاقَاتِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: To je vrijeme za praštanje i jačanje društvenih odnosa.
sentences.translationEn: It is a time for forgiveness and strengthening social relationships.
